subject: [PATCH v3 10/28] nfs_common: add new NOTIFY4_* flags proposed in RFC8881bis

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch adds new NOTIFY4_* flags to the NFSv4 protocol as proposed in RFC8881bis. The new flags are used in GET_DIR_DELEGATION and include various notification types such as AUFLAG_VALID, CHANGE_AUTH, and CFLAG_ORDER. These additions aim to support the requirements outlined in the revised document. The patch modifies several files, including documentation, header files, and source code for NFSv4 protocol generation.
